meta_title: For Freelancers: scaling apps to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to scaling apps and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Scale Apps Faster: Freelancer Guide to High-Speed Dev
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with slow development. Learn how to scale your apps efficiently using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver premium client work faster.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, decouple your architecture and automate boilerplate with AI-native tools. By integrating Antigravity for structural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative feature implementation, you transform your workflow from manual coding to high-level system orchestration, allowing you to ship production-grade features in hours, not weeks.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: the deadline is looming, the client is asking for 'one last feature,' and your codebase has become a tangled mess of technical debt. Every line you write feels like wading through concrete, and your velocity is cratering. This isn't just a lack of skill; it's a failure of tooling. The traditional approach to building apps is dead for the modern freelancer.

But what if you could treat your architecture like a Lego set, where complex features are snapped into place by AI agents that understand your codebase's DNA? By mastering the synergy between Antigravity and Claude Code, you stop writing code and start engineering outcomes. It’s time to move from manual labor to high-leverage development.

steps.title: Architecting for Modular Scale
steps.description: Before writing a single function, define your domain boundaries to prevent future spaghetti code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and propose a modular, domain-driven design architecture that isolates core business logic from UI components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor architecture into /src/modules/ based on domain-driven design principles'

steps.title: Automating Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Stop writing repetitive CRUD operations. Use AI to generate consistent patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a reusable repository pattern template for our Supabase backend that includes standard error handling and type-safe interfaces.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate repository pattern boilerplate for all entities in /src/models'

steps.title: Implementing AI-Assisted Feature Sprints
steps.description: Use Claude Code to flesh out feature logic while you focus on high-level integration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a roadmap for implementing the user authentication flow using the existing modular architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement OAuth authentication flow using existing service layer'

steps.title: Enforcing Code Quality at Scale
steps.description: Automate linting and type-safety checks to maintain high standards without manual reviews.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an automated pre-commit hook configuration that validates TypeScript types and runs linting for all new modules.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure husky pre-commit hooks for automated linting and type-checking'

steps.title: Optimizing for Production Performance
steps.description: Fine-tune your build process to ensure the app remains fast as it grows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze current build dependencies and suggest a tree-shaking strategy to reduce the final bundle size by 20%.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'optimize webpack configuration for tree-shaking and production bundling'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Context File' at the root so Claude Code understands your project's unique conventions without repeated instructions.
Use Antigravity to generate unit tests alongside your code; 90% coverage is the only way to scale without breaking legacy features.
Treat your prompts like documentation: store them in a /prompts folder for repeatable, consistent output across different client projects.
Implement a 'Feature Flag' system early, allowing you to deploy unfinished code to production safely while you continue working.
When Claude Code gets stuck, ask it to 'explain its current mental model of the codebase' to identify gaps in its context window.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project's dependency graph. Once your architecture is modularized, move your most repetitive tasks into a custom prompt library.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting slow development cycles dictate your income. By automating the heavy lifting, you reclaim your time and scale your freelance business to new heights. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
